title: Transform app into Bhai Bhai Fertilizer e-commerce platform

requirements.text: Replace the family messaging application with an e-commerce platform for Bhai Bhai Fertilizer company

quotes: MAKE A FERTILIZER COMPANY NAMED BHAI  BHAI FERTILIZER SO THAT I CAN SELL PRODUCTS

acceptanceCriteria: Application is rebranded as Bhai Bhai Fertilizer
Messaging functionality is removed
E-commerce functionality is implemented

requirements.text: Implement a product catalog system to display fertilizer products with name, description, price, and product images

quotes: SO THAT I CAN SELL PRODUCTS

acceptanceCriteria: Products can be stored and retrieved from backend
Product catalog displays all available fertilizer products
Each product shows name, description, price, and image

requirements.text: Create a shopping cart system that allows customers to add products, adjust quantities, and view cart total

quotes: SO THAT I CAN SELL PRODUCTS

acceptanceCriteria: Customers can add products to cart
Customers can adjust product quantities in cart
Cart displays subtotal and total price
Cart persists during session

requirements.text: Implement a checkout process that allows customers to complete purchases with order confirmation

quotes: SO THAT I CAN SELL PRODUCTS

acceptanceCriteria: Customers can proceed from cart to checkout
Checkout collects shipping and contact information
Orders are stored in backend with unique order IDs
Order confirmation is displayed after successful purchase

requirements.text: Implement customer authentication using Internet Identity to allow customers to securely log in and manage their orders
acceptanceCriteria: Customers can log in using Internet Identity
Customer profiles are stored with order history
Authenticated customers can view their past orders

requirements.text: Design a professional e-commerce visual theme for a fertilizer company with agricultural colors (greens and earth tones), clear product photography layouts, and trust-building design elements that convey reliability and expertise in the agriculture sector
acceptanceCriteria: Visual theme uses agricultural color palette
Layout is optimized for product browsing and purchasing
Design conveys professionalism and trustworthiness

constraints: Must use Internet Identity for authentication
Must use Motoko for backend logic in a single actor
Must use React with TypeScript for frontend
Must use Tailwind CSS for styling
nonGoals: Payment gateway integration (Stripe or other payment processors)

required: Bhai Bhai Fertilizer company logo with agricultural theme in green and earth tones (logo.dim_200x200.png)
Hero banner image showing lush green farmland with fertilizer application (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Generic fertilizer product bag illustration with green and brown colors (product-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
